tests.label: circular_citation
tests.description: The same entity appears as both citing and cited entity for the same Citation.
tests.query:
PREFIX cito: <http://purl.org/spar/cito/>
SELECT ?citation WHERE {
  ?citation cito:hasCitingEntity ?citing .
  ?citation cito:hasCitedEntity ?cited .
  FILTER(?citing = ?cited)
}
LIMIT 1
